prestazioni: Engine swap to a **2.5L CIH (Code: 25E) inline-4** from the Opel Monza, bored to 2.7L with forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm bore) and a custom billet crankshaft by **JE Pistons**, paired with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** for a 12.5:1 compression ratio. Forced induction via a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** with a **Tial 44mm wastegate** and **Precision Turbo 50mm blow-off valve**, running 1.2 bar of boost through a **custom air-to-water intercooler** by **Bell Intercoolers**

Full **Bosch Motronic ML4.1 ECU** standalone conversion with **Haltech Elite 2500** piggyback for sequential fuel injection, utilizing **ID1000x injectors** and a **Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump**. Custom **3-inch stainless steel exhaust** with **Scorpion 4-2-1 headers** and a **Supersprint 76mm rear section**, paired with a **Milltek Sport catalytic converter** for Euro compliance

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** (adjustable damping and ride height), **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** (25mm drop), **Polyurethane bushings** by **SuperPro** (full chassis refresh), and **Powerflex subframe mounts**. Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** (front) with **330mm slotted rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, paired with **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines**
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 Manta GT/E widebody kit** (fiberglass construction) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **rear diffuser** by **Seibon Carbon**, paired with **OEM+ rear spoiler** (extended 30mm) from the **Manta 400 homologation model**

Custom **BBS RS 16x9 ET15 (front) and 16x10 ET5 (rear) wheels** with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires** (225/45/16 front, 255/40/16 rear). **OMP Corsica seats** (FIA-approved) in **Recaro SRD shell** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, wrapped in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts** by **Sparco**

**Full respray in Opel Monza ‘Arctic White’ (Code: 140)** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the hood, roof, and rear hatch. **Hella Rallye 3000 headlights** (H4 conversion) with **Cibie Oscar fog lights**, paired with **custom LED taillights** by **Luxx Lighting** and **DTM-style side mirrors** from the **Opel Kadett C GT/E**
